---
title: Code Blocks
---

# Code Blocks

## Fenced with backticks

```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

## Fenced with tildes

~~~python
def hello():
    print("Hello, world!")
~~~

## With longer fences

`````markdown
Some markdown with ``` backticks inside.

And another ``` set.
`````

## Empty code block

```
```

## Code block with blank lines

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {

	fmt.Println("hello")

}
```

## Code block with special characters

```html
<div class="container">
  <p>Hello &amp; goodbye</p>
  <!-- comment -->
</div>
```

## Code block with tabs

```makefile
target:
	@echo "building"
	$(CC) -o output input.c
```

## No language tag

```
just plain code
with multiple lines
```

## Code block with info string metadata

```python title="example.py" showLineNumbers {1,3-5}
import os

def main():
    path = os.getcwd()
    print(f"CWD: {path}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
